name: Onion Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Put onions, unpeeled, on a plate. Cover with wet paper towel and cook in microwave on HIGH for 8 minutes. Cool and peel.
2. Heat bones at HIGH in the microwave for 1 minute. Loosen marrow from the bones.
3. Heat the marrow, cooled onions, and broth at HIGH in the microwave for 2 minutes. With a hand mixer, puree until very fine.
4. Add the dried cherries. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Wash chives and cut into thin strips. Add to sauce.
6. Serve sauce over roast beef.
